thresholdOverrides.reason: Composition-root hook that wires the feature hooks (incl. useAvailabilityCheck, useCapturedDelete, useRuleWindows, useViewerMode, usePersistentShortcuts, useFlowSort, useCompare, and the issue-90 useSavedFilters + useFilterActions pair) and gates the proxy/autoresponder wiring on viewer mode; fallow's cognitive score here reflects hook count (cyclomatic is 8), not branching. The issue-100 drag-drop open path adds the pending-drop confirm (requestOpenDropped / cancelOpenCapture).
Pure wiring component (cyclomatic 1); cognitive reflects prop/hook fan-out to its extracted subcomponents (HeaderRow/FlowScroll/useFlowMenu), not branching.

Feature hook that wires the scenario/rule/mock action callbacks (cyclomatic 1); cognitive reflects per-action callback fan-out (incl. the General-layer on/off toggle) — each action also tags its mutation for the undo-history timeline — not branching.
Settings shell driven by the section registry (cyclomatic 3); cognitive reflects prop fan-out to the section components (incl. the inline port-rebind error passed to Connections), not branching.
